title: Site Reliability Engineer (DevOps/Azure/Linux )
location: 165 Thái Hà, Dong Da, Ha Noi
job_description:
Optimizely is focused on unlocking digital potential. We are the recognized category leader in Digital Experience Platform (DXP) and created the category for A/B Testing and experimentation software. We have incredible customers – isn’t that one of the most important aspects of looking for your next job? Optimizely has over 9,000 brands from global organizations such as Visa, Sky, Yamaha, Wall Street Journal to tech innovators like Atlassian, DocuSign, Fitbit, and Zillow. Not only are we financially sound and growing but we have unicorn status: Exceeded $300M in revenue in 2020, is profitable already, and has all strategic options ahead of itself. Optimizely continues to invest and addresses a market opportunity north of $30 billion, providing significant personal career growth opportunities. We are an inclusive culture with a global team of 1500+ people across the US, Europe, Australia, and Vietnam. We blend European and American business culture with emphasis on teamwork, inclusion, and moving fast. People make the difference! If you are looking to work on the next generation of digital technologies in a fast-paced, hyper-growth environment, apply! We’re just getting started...
We are looking for a Senior Site Reliability Engineer to help build and scale our CloudOps capabilities. You will be responsible for designing, implementing, and operating critical infrastructure and platform services while collaborating closely with engineering, support, and product teams to improve the reliability, scalability, and performance of our systems. This is a hands-on technical role where you will be instrumental in shaping the SRE culture, driving automation, and ensuring high availability across all services.
Responsibilities:
Champion a Site Reliability Engineering culture across the organization by sharing best practices, tools, documentation, and code.
Identify and automate manual operational tasks using scripting, infrastructure-as-code, and CI/CD pipelines.
Build and maintain observability (monitoring, logging, tracing) for all production systems to ensure reliability, availability, and performance.
Proactively monitor alerts across all platforms and coordinate with SRE, Operations, Engineering, and Support teams to ensure quick detection and resolution of incidents—minimizing MTTA/MTTR.
Lead and manage on-call rotations, driving a blameless incident management and postmortem culture.
Collaborate with development teams to define and implement SLOs, SLIs, and error budgets.
Ensure uptime SLAs are met through robust automation, testing, monitoring, and operational best practices.
Create and maintain runbooks, playbooks, and system documentation to ensure operational readiness and knowledge sharing.
requirements:
About You:
Strong experience in Linux Systems Administration in cloud or virtualized environments.
Proficiency in infrastructure-as-code tools such as Terraform.
Hands-on experience with configuration management tools like Ansible or SaltStack.
Skilled in scripting and automation using Python and Bash.
Experience deploying and maintaining services in public cloud environments (Azure, AWS, or GCP).
Solid understanding of observability tooling, especially Datadog, ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana), or similar.
Experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines (e.g., GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, Octopus).
Familiarity with Kubernetes and Docker; production experience is a strong plus.
Experience operating and scaling distributed systems across multiple regions.
Strong communication and collaboration skills; comfortable working across time zones.
Passion for learning, continuous improvement, and a strong sense of ownership.
Fluent in English, both written and spoken.
benefits:
Hackdays for self-studying and researching any IT-related subjects.
5 working days/week with flexible working time and no overtime.
Annual unforgettable company outing.
International, professional, creative working environment and talented teams.
Onsite opportunities in Europe and US.
Common cultural-sportive- art Clubs and activities, sponsored and/or supported by the Company (Ex: Football, GYM, Swimming, Guitar, English…).
Powerful workstation: Core i7-9700, 16-32 GB RAM, 02 x QHD 2560x1440 monitors (2K resolution).
100% official salary during the probation period, 13th month salary, annual salary raise.
Up to 03 extra paid-leave days per year.
Social, Health and Unemployed Insurance are based on 100%.
Gross salary and fully paid by Company.
Extra bonus at $ 60 per special occasions (Birthday, Labor Day, National Day, Solar New year, Lunar New Year).
Lunch allowance at $30 per month.
Baby allowance for a child under 03 years old is $ 12 per month.
AON Premium Healthcare Insurance package for employees and their children up to 18 years old.
Daily various foods, drink, and seasonal fresh fruits.
And many other benefits, let's join us to discover!

title: Technical Business Analyst

job_description:

Key Responsibilities
Lead Agile Scrum Team:
Act as the Product Owner, collaborating with cross-functional team members to define and prioritize product backlog items aligned with business objectives.
Requirements Gathering: Elicit, analyze, and document detailed functional and non-functional requirements for new features, enhancements, and integrations.
User Story Development:
Translate requirements into user stories with clear acceptance criteria, ensuring alignment with user needs and product goals.
Stakeholder Communication:
Work closely with internal stakeholders, including product management, marketing, and technical teams, to gather feedback, report on progress, and ensure expectations are managed effectively.
Performance Metrics and KPI Monitoring:
Develop and monitor KPIs, identifying actionable insights and recommending strategies to improve performance and user engagement.
Continuous Improvement:
Leverage agile principles to drive iterative development, ensuring regular product updates and optimizations based on user feedback and data analysis.
Guidance and Mentorship:
Provide guidance to less experienced team members, fostering a collaborative and high-performance team environment.
requirements:
Education & Experience: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Science, or a related field. Minimum of 5-7 years of experience in a business analysis or product management role, with a strong background in agile methodologies.
Analytical Skills: Demonstrated ability to independently resolve complex issues, make sound judgments, and improve existing solutions.
Technical Proficiency: Familiarity with mobile application development and experience with analytics tools for tracking KPIs in the restaurant or retail industry is preferred.
Communication & Influence: Proven track record of effective communication with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, with the ability to represent the product team internally and externally.
Problem Solving: Strong problem-solving skills with a focus on enhancing product functionality, user experience, and business impact.

title: Data Governance Manager (Consumer Finance) - Upto $4000
location: Tầng 12A, Tháp Tây, tòa nhà LOTTE Center Hà Nội, 54 Liễu Giai, Ba Dinh, Ha Noi
job_description:
1. Governance Framework & Policy
• Design, implement, and maintain the enterprise-wide Data Governance Framework, aligning with corporate strategy and regulatory requirements.
• Define and enforce data policies, standards, and procedures for data quality, data lifecycle management, metadata management, and data access.
• Establish a data ownership and stewardship model, ensuring accountability for data assets across business units.
2. Data Quality & Compliance
• Develop and monitor data quality metrics and KPIs, identify data quality issues, and coordinate remediation actions.
• Ensure compliance with data-related regulations (e.g., GDPR, local data privacy laws, SBV/State Bank of Vietnam requirements for financial institutions).
• Partner with IT, Risk, and Compliance teams to manage data security, privacy, and classification standards.
3. Data Stewardship & Collaboration
• Lead and coordinate data steward and data owner communities across the organization.
• Provide training, awareness, and communication programs to promote a strong data culture.
• Collaborate with business and technology teams to ensure alignment between data governance, architecture, and data analytics initiatives.
4. Metadata & Master Data Management
• Support implementation and adoption of metadata management tools, data catalogues, and master data management (MDM) systems.
• Ensure consistent business glossary definitions and alignment across data domains.
5. Reporting & Continuous Improvement
• Regularly report data governance KPIs and progress to senior management and data governance committees.
• Continuously assess and improve data governance maturity, practices, and tools.
requirements:
Bachelor’s degree or higher in Information Management, Computer Science, Business, or related field.
5+ years of experience in data management, governance, or data quality roles; at least 2–3 years in a managerial or leadership capacity.
Proven experience implementing enterprise data governance frameworks and tools (e.g., Collibra, Informatica Axon, Alation, IBM IGC).
Familiarity with data management best practices (DAMA-DMBOK) and regulatory requirements for data handling.
Strong knowledge of data architecture, metadata, master data, and data quality management concepts.
Excellent stakeholder management, communication, and facilitation skills.
Good command of English is an advantage

16 days of annual leave

80% of total income

24/7 health care insurance (including coverage for family members)
And many other exclusive benefits
only at Lotte Finance

title: UA Playable Ads Developer (Unity, C#)
location: UOA Tower, 11th Floor, 06 Tan Trao Street, Tan Phu Ward, District 7, Ho Chi Minh; Fresher Accepted
job_description:
Team của chúng tôi bắt đầu bằng việc tạo ra các video mô phỏng chân thực định dạng quảng cáo 'Playable' (có thể chơi được) độc đáo. Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm một lập trình viên để phát triển những video này thành 'Quảng cáo Playable dạng Game' có tính tương tác cao và chịu trách nhiệm hoàn toàn về mặt triển khai kỹ thuật.
Chúng tôi đang chờ đợi sự gia nhập của một developer tích cực và linh hoạt, người không chỉ dừng lại ở việc coding đơn thuần mà còn muốn thiết kế '
trải nghiệm'
phản hồi ngay lập tức theo thao tác của user.
Chúng tôi coi trọng mindset hơn là năng lực kỹ thuật hoàn hảo; đặc biệt đề cao khả năng linh hoạt thích ứng với thay đổi, giao tiếp tích cực với đồng nghiệp và cùng nhau giải quyết vấn đề.
Cách thức làm việc (Quy trình & Phối hợp)
Hợp tác 'One-Team' với Designer:
Chúng tôi áp dụng các resource do designer tạo ra vào mini-game logic dùng cho video để xây dựng quảng cáo dưới dạng video, đồng thời chủ động kiểm chứng sức hấp dẫn của quảng cáo. Dựa trên những concept đã được kiểm chứng như vậy, chúng tôi vận hành một pipeline xây dựng mang tính hữu cơ để hoàn thiện quảng cáo playable có thể thao tác thực tế.
Vòng lặp phản hồi linh hoạt với Trụ sở Hàn Quốc:
Chúng tôi hướng tới một môi trường làm việc linh hoạt, nơi có thể trực tiếp giao tiếp với team Hàn Quốc, theo dõi hiệu suất của quảng cáo và dựa trên đó nhanh chóng cải thiện tính năng hoặc thử nghiệm những hướng tiếp cận mới.
Giao tiếp hướng tới đồng nghiệp:
Ngay cả khi đối mặt với những giới hạn kỹ thuật phức tạp, chúng tôi coi trọng nhất thái độ tích cực cùng nhau suy nghĩ 'làm thế nào để triển khai thú vị hơn' thay vì nói rằng 'không làm được'.
Trách nhiệm chính
Thiết kế Logic nội dung tương tác:
Triển khai logic mini-game cho các quảng cáo video bằng engine Unity để hiện thực hóa các yếu tố cốt lõi trong video ads như chiến đấu, puzzle, mô phỏng, v.v.
Tối ưu hóa Game:
Tối ưu hóa các tài nguyên đồ họa (art resources) và tích hợp vào engine để xây dựng một môi trường quảng cáo nhẹ nhàng nhưng vẫn mang lại trải nghiệm nhập vai.
Ghi chú thêm
Vị trí này là vai trò cốt lõi quyết định chất lượng kỹ thuật của video ad dựa trên playable và playable ads.
Chúng tôi xây dựng playable ads có thể chơi được bằng Unity, vượt qua những giới hạn của mini-game cho video và quảng cáo dựa trên HTML5.
requirements:
Yêu cầu công việc
[Bắt buộc]
Một người có khả năng giao tiếp tích cực, có thể thích ứng linh hoạt với thay đổi và phối hợp vui vẻ cùng các bộ phận khác (Designer, Marketer, v.v.).
Có kinh nghiệm thực tế với engine Unity và khả năng triển khai event logic bằng C#.
Có kinh nghiệm phát triển các mini-game thuộc thể loại hyper-casual hoặc mô phỏng (simulation).
Bắt buộc nộp Portfolio (Phải nêu rõ vai trò cụ thể của bạn trong các dự án sử dụng Unity).
Kỹ năng giao tiếp xuất sắc.
Ưu tiên
Ứng viên có kinh nghiệm sản xuất Playable Ads (quảng cáo tương tác) hoặc sở hữu kiến thức liên quan đến quảng cáo dựa trên nền tảng HTML5
Có kinh nghiệm trong các dự án hướng tới người dùng toàn cầu hoặc phát triển hỗ trợ đa ngôn ngữ.
Có hiểu biết cơ bản về các chỉ số hiệu suất UA (CPI, CTR, v.v.).
Có khả năng sử dụng các công cụ sản xuất video như Premiere Pro để thấu hiểu sâu sắc hơn về quy trình làm việc với các designer.
Hồ sơ yêu cầu
CV và Bản mô tả kinh nghiệm làm việc (định dạng PDF).
Portfolio (Bắt buộc: Phải bao gồm các dự án làm bằng Unity).
benefits:
Chance to work on global projects with multicultural teams, world-class games.
Attractive salary and benefits.

title: Delivery Manager
location: PVI Tower, số 1 Phạm Văn Bạch, Yên Hòa, Cau Giay, Ha Noi
job_description:
Responsibilities
As a Delivery Manager at NSC, you can work remotely, with flexible working hours.
We are looking for an experienced and results-driven Delivery Manager to lead the successful execution of client projects, ensuring quality, timelines, and stakeholder satisfaction. This role is critical in scaling our delivery operations and is structured as a leadership track position toward Chief Delivery Officer (CDO). This role is positioned on the
Leadership Track
, with growth toward the
Chief Delivery Officer (CDO)
. As you progress, you will:
Take on wider portfolio management responsibilities
Participate in strategic planning and executive decision-making
Lead transformation initiatives across delivery functions
Own delivery governance and company-wide client satisfaction metrics
Main responsibilities:
Project Oversight & Delivery Leadership
Manage end-to-end project delivery across multiple teams and clients, ensuring quality, budget, and timeline.
Work closely with technical leads and project managers to ensure team alignment and execution.
Monitor KPIs across delivery teams and drive continuous improvement across the board.
Presales & Client Engagement
Participate in presales activities, including requirement analysis, solution design, and estimation.
Collaborate with the sales team to prepare proposals and statements of work (SoW).
Join bidding and pitching sessions with potential clients as a technical and delivery advisor.
Support project onboarding and transition from presales to delivery.
Provide clients with advice on software architecture, technology stack, and delivery models (Agile, Scrum, Kanban).
Act as a trusted advisor in technical and process matters during early engagement phases.
Suggest improvements to delivery processes, tools, and governance models.
Team Building & Growth
Recruit, mentor, and grow high-performing delivery teams.(PMs, BAs, Devs, QA, etc.)
Promote a culture of ownership, learning, and excellence within the team.
Ensure proper resource allocation and skill development
Stakeholder Management
Act as the main point of contact for clients and internal stakeholders
Maintain regular communication, status updates, and project reporting
Build trust-based relationships through transparency and reliability
Operational Excellence
Implement delivery best practices, frameworks, and metrics (e.g., Agile, Scrum, OKRs)
Optimize delivery processes for scalability, consistency, and quality
Collaborate with Sales and Tech teams to align business goals with delivery capabilities
Contribute to resource planning, budgeting, and forecasting
Support initiatives that improve profitability, client satisfaction, and team performance
Identify opportunities for business growth through efficient delivery models
requirements:
Skills & Qualifications:
Fluent in English communication
5+ years of experience in project or delivery management, preferably in IT, software, or digital services
Proven track record of delivering complex, multi-team projects on time and within budget
Strong understanding of project management methodologies (Agile, Scrum, Kanban, or hybrid)
Hands-on experience with project management tools (e.g., Jira, Asana, Trello, MS Project)
Demonstrated ability to lead cross-functional teams (PMs, Developers, QA, BAs, designers)
Excellent stakeholder communication and expectation management skills
Strong problem-solving and conflict-resolution capabilities
Ability to balance strategic thinking with hands-on execution
Comfortable with KPIs, delivery metrics, and continuous improvement
High degree of ownership, accountability, and business mindset
Nice-to-have skills and experience
Experience with scaling delivery operations in fast-growing or startup environments
Client-facing experience in high-stakes projects, particularly enterprise or international clients
Knowledge of budgeting and financial management within delivery (e.g., margin control, P&L exposure)
Experience managing hybrid or remote teams across multiple time zones
Understanding of DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, or modern engineering practices
Formal certifications such as PMP, PRINCE2, SAFe, or ITIL
Familiarity with product delivery cycles or experience in a product-led organization
Change management or transformation leadership experience
Exposure to CRM/ERP systems or industry-specific software, depending on your domain
Strong data literacy (e.g., using data for performance tracking, OKRs, reporting)
benefits:
At NSC Software, we believe that great people build great products. Joining us means becoming part of a professional, global-minded, and supportive environment where your growth truly matters.
Benefits & Opportunities:
1. Competitive and performance-based compensation package
2. Flexible working environment with remote work options
3. Career development through continuous training and mentorship from company founders
4. Opportunity to collaborate with top-tier tech companies worldwide
5. Exposure to global projects and international clients
6. Annual business trips to countries such as Australia, Europe, or the U.S.
7. Professional, open, and multicultural working culture

vSphere/ESXi
; quản lý máy chủ vật lý, hệ thống lưu trữ, tối ưu tài nguyên hệ thống máy ảo (VM).

Cài đặt, vận hành và tối ưu hóa hệ điều hành Linux; quản trị các máy chủ ứng dụng (

MySQL, MariaDB

, đảm bảo các ứng dụng chạy ổn định trên hạ tầng hệ thống.
Quản trị hạ tầng mạng & Bảo mật:
Quản trị hệ thống đường truyền kết nối của công ty.
Cấu hình và vận hành thiết bị mạng vật lý
Cisco
(Router, Switch, Firewall).

Proxy WSG, NAC
, thiết lập chính sách Firewall.

Lập kế hoạch liên quan bảo trì, nâng cấp hệ thống định kỳ:
Lập kế hoạch, đề xuất nâng cấp bảo trì và báo cáo công việc.
Viết tài liệu báo cáo, hướng dẫn vận hành, lập hồ sơ bản vẽ kỹ thuật liên quan đến hệ thống.
requirements:
3. Yêu cầu chuyên môn
Học vấn:
Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin
hoặc Điện tử viễn thông.
Chứng chỉ:
Sở hữu chứng chỉ
CCNA, CCNP
. Ưu tiên ứng viên có thêm chứng chỉ VCP hoặc LPI/RHCSA.
Kinh nghiệm & Kỹ năng:
Tối thiểu 3-5 năm kinh nghiệm quản trị hệ thống ảo hóa VMWare và máy chủ Linux.
Kinh nghiệm chuyên sâu về mô hình mạng, giao thức định tuyến và bảo mật hạ tầng.
Kỹ năng mềm về lập kế hoạch, viết tài liệu kỹ thuật và quản lý hồ sơ hệ thống bài bản.
Thành thạo kỹ năng phân tích Log và giải quyết sự cố (Troubleshooting) mạng/hệ thống.
4. Quyền lợi
Mức lương cạnh tranh, tương xứng với năng lực.
Chế độ bảo hiểm, thưởng lễ tết và lương tháng 13.
Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, được đào tạo nâng cao chuyên môn.
benefits:
Đãi ngộ
# Dẫn đầu thị trường
Cơ hội được làm việc tại Tập đoàn tiên phong mở đường , kiến tạo tương lai thông minh, gắn kết của Việt Nam.
Cơ hội được thử sức trong những lĩnh vực công nghệ tiên tiến, hiện đại nhất.
# Môi trường năng động sáng tạo
Môi trường làm việc cởi mở và năng động, khuyến khích trao đổi ý tưởng ở mọi cấp, cho phép bạn làm việc, sáng tạo theo cách riêng.
Được khơi gợi cảm hứng làm việc với văn phòng xanh, không gian mở, hiện đại tiêu chuẩn quốc tế.
# Cơ hội thử thách và phát triển
Áp dụng kiến thức, kĩ năng, kinh nghiệm chuyên môn giải quyết các bài toán hấp dẫn, thử thách tại Viettel.
Cơ hội thử sức ở nhiều lĩnh vực, sản phẩm và quốc gia khác nhau góp phần thay đổi xã hội .
Viettel cam kết cho bạn nền tảng vững chắc để học hỏi và phát triển.
Sẵn sàng trao quyền, cơ hội đột phá cho những người trẻ tuổi.
Cơ hội học hỏi từ các chuyên gia hàng đầu, lãnh đạo và đồng nghiệp ưu tú.
Cơ hội được đào tạo, trao dồi kĩ năng định kì và nhu cầu thực tế.
# Chế ngộ đãi ngộ hấp dẫn, cạnh tranh
Lương thưởng cạnh tranh trên thị trường, phản ánh đúng năng lực thực tế.
Được thư giãn, khơi nguồn sáng tạo với Happy Time mỗi ngày .
Thưởng thức bữa trưa thơm ngon tại Tập đoàn, được chọn lọc bởi các chuyên gia dinh dưỡng.
Cơ hội tham gia gắn kết với tập thể, tổ chức với các hoạt động team building thú vị
Chế độ chăm sóc y tế đặc biệt cho CBNV và người thân với trang thiết bị hiện đại.
Khác
Viettel tuyệt đối không thu bất cứ khoản tiền nào của ứng viên khi nộp hồ sơ tham gia dự tuyển và khi vào làm việc tại Viettel nếu trúng tuyển

title: Mid/Sr Fullstack Software Engineer (.NET, React, C#)
location: Tòa nhà A5, Lô số A5, khu E-Office, đường Sáng Tạo, KCX Tân Thuận, Phường Tân Thuận, District 7, Ho Chi Minh
job_description:
We are seeking a full-stack software engineer to contribute to the design and implementation of a real-time production management application for truss and wall panel manufacturers.
The engineer accepting this position will work as part of a Scrum based, Agile software team developing a service-based .NET application with both web and desktop components. We are open to different experience levels, but our ideal candidate will have prior experience with object-oriented programing and experience working with .NET, SQL, and one or both of React and WPF.
Beyond specific technical expertise, we are looking for candidates with strong troubleshooting skills who can learn quickly. An ability to communicate clearly, and engage in humble, candid debate is important. We succeed as a team, and we are looking for someone excited to work with other developers in a collaborative environment.
Project Summary:
MiTek Production
is a desktop application combined with a React-based web interface to support customers, streamlining truss and wall manufacturing with real-time tracking, paperless workflows, and performance monitoring. MiTek Inc. applies its Design‑Make‑Build™ approach globally, integrating software, engineered products, and automation across 64 locations, including major plants in North America and a large engineering hub in Vietnam.
Responsibilities:
Design, develop, test, and maintain high-quality software solutions using modern full-stack technologies.
Lead technical design and implementation for large or complex features, ensuring scalability, maintainability, and performance.
Refactor and modernize existing codebases to improve efficiency and quality.
Collaborate cross-functionally with Product Management, QA, and other engineering teams to deliver solutions that meet both business and technical goals.
Work effectively in an Agile environment (Scrum or Kanban) to deliver value iteratively and continuously.
Communicate and collaborate with global teams and stakeholders across different time zones.
Train and mentor junior team members, promoting knowledge sharing and continuous learning.
requirements:
Required Qualifications:
Functional knowledge of object-oriented programming
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field from an accredited university
3+ years of software design and development using relevant technologies required
English proficiency at B2 level or above (or equivalent) is required for effective communication with global teams.
Experience in developing Web Applications and Desktop Applications.
Ability to dig into large codebases to diagnose, debug, and resolve critical issues
Ability to refactor code to fix root causes
Knowledge of data structures and strong understanding of object-oriented principles
Experience driving designs, mentoring team members, and guiding technical discussions
Strong communication skills with the ability to collaborate across teams and influence outcomes
Experience with:
C# / .NET
HTML, CSS, and JavaScript / TypeScript
SQL

Understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and Agile methodologies.
Experience with:
React
WPF
Angular
Entity Framework Core
RESTful API Development
MassTransit
RabbitMQ or Azure Service Bus
Azure DevOps
Azure

title: UX Designer (Good English)
location: The Glory Home Building, 215B10 Nguyen Van Huong, An Khanh Ward, Thu Duc City, Ho Chi Minh
job_description:
About the job
We’re looking for a talented UX Designer to join the Banqup Group design team and help shape intuitive, meaningful digital experiences. In this role, you’ll collaborate closely with our mobile and web development teams, as well as with designers across Vietnam, Belgium, and Romania.
As a UX Designer, you’ll own the end-to-end user journey across our applications, from discovery and research to concept and execution. You’ll uncover user needs, translate insights into elegant mobile and web solutions, and continuously refine experiences that create real value for our users.
If you’re passionate about understanding user behavior, enjoy turning complex problems into simple, delightful experiences, and thrive in a collaborative, international environment, we’d love to hear from you.
Key Responsibilities
Take ownership of your projects, being proactive in coordinating with team members in different time zones while managing tasks and deadlines effectively.
Present your work to the stakeholders in well-crafted deliverables such as wireframes, clickable prototypes, or concept presentations.
Leverage and contribute to our design system to ensure consistency, scalability, and efficiency across mobile and web products.
Clearly communicate and present design concepts, rationale, and outcomes to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Gather and analyze user insights through research to inform design decisions and ensure solutions meet real user needs.
Apply a structured design process to explore, ideate, and deliver the best possible UX solutions.
Design intuitive, accessible, and visually compelling user interfaces that align with UX and UI best practices.
Exhibit strong communication and presentation skills to effectively articulate your design concepts and decisions to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Demonstrate excellent time management skills to ensure project deliverables are met on time and to a high standard.
requirements:
Degree in UX/UI design, Product design, or a related field.
Proven experience as a mid-level (3-5 years) UX designer, with a strong portfolio.
Proficiency in design tools such as Figma, or other relevant software.
Strong knowledge of user-centered design methodologies and usability principles.
Solid understanding of mobile design principles, including responsive design, adaptive layout, and mobile platform guidelines (iOS, Android).
The capability to independently conduct thorough research, showcasing a proactive approach to acquiring insights and informing design decisions.
Experience with prototyping to demonstrate interactive designs and user flows.
Excellent communication skills, fluency in English, and the ability to express yourself, your ideas, and your work effectively in English.
Passion for staying updated with the latest design trends and technologies in the industry.
Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced and collaborative environment, adapting to changing business requirements.
Ability to take ownership of projects, working efficiently and responsibly, in a design team with different time zones.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to translate stakeholder insights into intuitive and impactful design solutions.
Well-versed in European companies and solutions, adept at leveraging this knowledge to create exceptional user experiences.
benefits:
Office hours: 9:00 AM 🡪 12:00 PM, 1:00 PM 🡪 06:00 PM, off on Saturday and Sunday. Annual holidays leave will be following Vietnam law and as company regulations.
25 days of annual leave
Flexible working hours
Competitive remuneration package
13th salary
Social insurance, health insurance, and unemployment insurance will be under Labor Law.
Generous private medical health insurance for employees & family members
Dynamic, young & international environment
Team building activities & outing

Opportunity for traveling & training in Europe

job_description:

đang tìm kiếm thêm thành viên gia nhập đội ngũ với vai trò

để cùng Bluetech khai phá sức mạnh của dữ liệu trong lĩnh vực tài chính.
BẠN SẼ LÀM GÌ?
Xây dựng & Phát triển:
Thiết kế các mô hình tìm kiếm khách hàng, mô hình chấm điểm tín nhiệm/gian lận (credit scoring/risk model) và các hệ thống cảnh báo sớm cho sản phẩm tài chính.
Hợp tác & Định nghĩa:
Phối hợp chặt chẽ với bộ phận Product và Business để định nghĩa và tối ưu các sản phẩm Machine Learning, trọng tâm là mảng vay cá nhân và SME.
Xử lý dữ liệu:
Trực tiếp làm sạch, chiết xuất đặc trưng (feature engineering) và khám phá các cách tiếp cận mới để nâng cao chất lượng mô hình.

title: DevOps Engineer (Kubernetes/ Docker)
location: Tầng 20A, Vincom Center Đồng Khởi, 72 Lê Thánh Tôn, phường Bến Nghé, District 1, Ho Chi Minh; Tòa nhà TechnoPark, Oceanpark, Đa Tốn, Gia Lam, Ha Noi
job_description:
About Us
We're building the infrastructure behind a ride-hailing platform that connects millions of passengers and drivers across Vietnam every single day. When someone books a ride at midnight in the rain, our systems need to work — no exceptions. Peak hours, surge events, promotional campaigns — our infrastructure handles it all without flinching.
We're a sharp DevOps team that automates first, documents always, and treats a flaky pipeline the same way we treat a production incident: fix it properly, don't patch it. If you want to work on systems that genuinely matter to millions of people's daily commute, read on.
What You'll Do
Own and evolve our Kubernetes clusters (GKE/EKS) across multiple environments — the same clusters that dispatch thousands of ride requests per minute during rush hour.
Manage and optimize our databases (MySQL/PostgreSQL) for high availability: replication, failover, backup, and performance tuning.
Maintain infrastructure as code using Terraform, Helm, and Ansible — every change is reviewed, versioned, and reproducible.
Own the full CI/CD lifecycle: code commit → automated testing → staging → production, via Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and ArgoCD.
Build deployment guardrails: canary releases, feature flags, automated rollbacks
Maintain and evolve our monitoring stack: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, Fluentd — tuned to the specific traffic patterns of a ride-hailing platform (morning commute spikes, weekend surges, rain-day demand explosions).
Ensure every service emits the right metrics, logs, and traces so that when something goes wrong, engineers can find the root cause in minutes, not hours.
Build alerts that wake people up for real reasons — not false positives at 3 AM.
Drive cloud cost optimization
requirements:
Required
5+ years of DevOps or infrastructure engineering experience in production environments handling real user traffic.
Strong Kubernetes and Docker skills — you can debug a crashlooping pod, trace a network issue, and tune resource limits.
Mastery of GitOps tooling: ArgoCD (or Flux), Terraform, and cross-account deployment patterns
Hands-on experience with MySQL or PostgreSQL in high-availability configurations: replication, backup strategies, and query performance analysis.
Good observability: ELK, Prometheus, Grafana, Fluentd — you build dashboards people actually use.
Comfortable scripting in Python, Go, or Bash to automate the boring stuff.
Automation-first mindset — if something is done manually more than twice, it should be a script.
Good understanding of cloud infrastructure design and how they interact at scale.
Deep expertise operating production EKS (or GKE/AKS) clusters, IRSA, Karpenter/cluster-autoscaler, network policies, etc.
Good communication skills, ability to collaborate with different teams
Strong Plus
Experience with service mesh (Istio/Linkerd) and API gateway management.
Familiarity with event-driven architectures and message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ)
GCP or AWS cost management experience
benefits:
QUYỀN LỢI CHUNG KHI GIA NHẬP VINSMART FUTURE
• Thời gian làm việc, chấm công linh hoạt (Work from home vào thứ 7 làm việc).
• Mức thu nhập, các gói thưởng hấp dẫn, cạnh tranh mạnh mẽ so với thị trường.
• Được hưởng chế độ ưu đãi khi sử dụng các dịch vụ thuộc hệ sinh thái Tập đoàn: Ưu đãi học phí (Vinschool), khám chữa bệnh (Vinmec), nghỉ dưỡng (Vinpearl), mua xe (VinFast), thuê hoặc/và mua nhà (Vinhomes) … theo chế độ của Tập đoàn.
• Cơ hội tiếp cận dự án chiến lược công nghệ trọng điểm, quy mô lớn.
• Cơ hội làm việc trong môi trường công nghệ chuyên nghiệp, quy tụ các nhà khoa học, chuyên gia, kỹ sư đến từ các Công ty công nghệ hàng đầu Việt Nam và thế giới.
• Cung cấp các nguồn học tập miễn phí trên các nền tảng Udemy, Coursera, O’Reilly; hội thảo nội bộ; tài trợ chứng chỉ và chương trình cố vấn đặc biệt từ Ban lãnh đạo Tập đoàn và Công ty.
• Cơ hội tham gia các Câu lạc bộ công nghệ của Tập đoàn, các sự kiện công nghệ nội bộ để học hỏi, phát triển những dự án, ý tưởng cá nhân vào thực tế.
• Cung cấp các chương trình đào tạo để trở thành "Giảng viên nội bộ" tham gia chia sẻ chuyên môn với những quyền lợi đặc biệt.
• Được hưởng đầy đủ các chế độ bảo hiểm theo quy định của Luật Lao động (BHXH, BHYT, BHTN) và được Công ty mua Bảo hiểm sức khỏe cá nhân theo cấp bậc vị trí, khám sức khỏe định kỳ tại Bệnh viện và Trung tâm khám sức khỏe uy tín trên toàn quốc.
• 12 ngày nghỉ phép năm, nghỉ các ngày lễ, Tết theo quy định của pháp luật.
• Phụ cấp ăn trưa.
• Tham gia các hoạt động nội bộ, hoạt động teambuilding, sự kiện hàng năm của Công ty.

title: Senior Tester (Tiếng Nhật N2)

job_description:

tối thiểu từ 4-5 năm kinh nghiệm
chuyên sâu trong lĩnh vực kiểm thử.

Có kinh nghiệm viết Test Case, đặc biệt theo phương pháp Decision Table Test (DTT) để đảm bảo kiểm tra đầy đủ các điều kiện của hệ thống (đặc biệt là 30+ Rule của Fraud Model)..

title: Senior Platform Architect – React, Next.js | Remote
location: Australia
job_description:
The Role
This role will start
part-time (10–20 hours per week)
with the potential to transition into a
full-time technical leadership role
as the platform scales.
You will lead the
platform architecture and technical direction
while working alongside developers, DevOps engineers and the UAT team to ensure the system is built efficiently, securely and with long-term scalability in mind.
This role is primarily focused on
architecture and technical leadership
, but we are also looking for someone comfortable being
hands-on when required
, particularly around backend architecture, data modelling and system design.
You will help define the technology stack, validate developer implementation, review architecture decisions and ensure development follows best practices across performance, scalability and security.
Key Responsibilities
Platform Architecture
Design and maintain the overall platform architecture
Define service boundaries, APIs and core system modules
Architect the platform for multi-tenant SaaS scalability
Guide technical decisions for the MVP and long-term platform evolution
Ensure the system remains modular, scalable and extensible
Backend & Data Architecture
This role is primarily
backend and data architecture focused
. Responsibilities include:
designing scalable APIs and service architecture
defining database architecture and data models
designing ingestion pipelines and background processing systems
ensuring performance, reliability and scalability of the platform
Security Architecture
Design and validate key security layers including:
tenant data isolation
row-level security and access control
API authentication and authorization
encryption and secure data storage
audit logging and traceability
protection against data leakage or privilege escalation
Development Oversight
Review developer architecture decisions and code
Validate performance, concurrency handling and scalability
Ensure high standards of maintainable code and system design
Identify improvements in database models and APIs
Guide efficient engineering practices
DevOps & Engineering Delivery Leadership
You will help oversee engineering delivery and ensure the platform is deployed and maintained using modern DevOps practices.
Responsibilities include:
guiding development and DevOps workflows
overseeing CI/CD pipelines and deployment processes
ensuring reliable staging, testing and production environments
coordinating development, infrastructure and UAT activities
improving engineering efficiency and release cycles
ensuring platform reliability, monitoring and observability
You may work with or guide DevOps engineers responsible for infrastructure and deployments.
AI-Assisted Engineering
We actively encourage
AI-assisted development workflows
.
You will guide the team in using tools such as:
Claude
Codex
AI-assisted coding environments
to improve:
developer productivity
automated code generation
testing workflows
documentation
engineering efficiency
Data Platform Design
Assist in designing the core data models for:
supply chain data analytics
supplier and product data modelling
pricing and market intelligence systems
data ingestion and analytics pipelines
QA and UAT Oversight
Work with the UAT team to ensure:
architecture integrity
security layers are properly implemented
performance requirements are met
new features align with platform architecture standards
Platform Architecture Overview
The MegaMine platform will consist of
core platform services and modular product modules
.
Core Platform Services
These services form the foundation of the system:
Authentication and tenant management
Data ingestion and normalization pipelines
Price indexing and analytics engines
Search capabilities (keyword and semantic)
Alert and notification systems
Audit logging
Infrastructure & Technology Experience
While the final architecture will be defined by the Platform Architect, experience with modern SaaS infrastructure and data platforms is expected.
Relevant experience may include:
Frontend Platforms
modern web frameworks such as React or Next.js
TypeScript-based frontend architectures
Backend Platforms
Node.js, TypeScript or similar backend frameworks
modular API architectures
REST or GraphQL APIs
Data Platforms
PostgreSQL or other relational databases
time-series or analytics databases
caching and queue systems (e.g. Redis)
Storage
object storage systems such as S3-compatible storage
Infrastructure & DevOps
AWS, GCP or similar cloud platforms
CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI or similar)
containerisation (Docker)
infrastructure as code (Terraform or similar)
monitoring and observability tooling
Background Processing
Experience designing systems with background processing such as:
ingestion pipelines
alert processing
notification systems
scheduled data integrations
requirements:
About You
You are an experienced architect who has built
scalable SaaS platforms or data-intensive systems
.
You are comfortable leading architecture decisions while also contributing hands-on when required, particularly in backend systems and data modelling.
You enjoy shaping the foundations of early-stage platforms and working with small, high-performing engineering teams.
Required Experience
SaaS platform architecture
backend system design and development
relational database architecture (e.g. PostgreSQL)
API design and distributed systems
multi-tenant SaaS system design
cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP or similar)
experience leading engineering teams including developers, DevOps and QA
Preferred Experience
AI / LLM integrations
vector databases or RAG pipelines
data analytics or intelligence platforms
high-volume API systems
B2B SaaS startups
DevOps pipelines and cloud infrastructure management
Engagement Details
Part-time role:
10–20 hours per week
Remote / international candidates welcome
Potential to transition to
full-time platform leadership role
Why Join
Architect a new AI-driven SaaS platform from the ground up
Work with modern data and AI technologies
Influence the technical direction of a global platform
Flexible remote engagement with long-term opportunity
benefits:
Work on Switch AI — a live, AI-powered platform for procurement, sales, and quality management used by a real Australian business.
Remote-friendly setup with a collaborative, no-drama team culture.
Direct access to leadership — your work and ideas are seen and acted on quickly.
Work across a modern tech stack: Next.js, Supabase, OpenAI, NetSuite API.
Opportunities to grow into senior and lead roles as the product scales.
Exposure to global clients and cross-border operations (Australia, Philippines, and beyond).

title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer (Java, ReactJS, JavaScript)
location: Etown 1 Building, Unit 9.2, 364 Cong Hoa Street, Ward 13, Tan Binh District, Tan Binh, Ho Chi Minh
job_description:
About the Role:
We are seeking a highly proactive Senior Full-Stack Engineer (5+ years of experience) with a strong frontend focus to join our team. You will be instrumental in building scalable user interfaces using React, powered by a purely Headless Magnolia CMS backend.
We operate in a fast-paced, modern environment and are actively embracing AI-assisted development. We are looking for a self-starter —someone who doesn't wait to be told what to do, actively identifies and solves blockers independently, and communicates effectively across the team.
Key Responsibilities
Frontend: Drive the development of robust, high-performance UIs using React, seamlessly consuming REST APIs from our Headless Magnolia setup.
Backend Integration & Support: While the immediate focus is on the frontend, you will work with Java to configure Magnolia, expose RESTful services, and maintain backend stability.
Autonomous Execution: Take ownership of your deliverables. Proactively identify blockers, propose solutions, and independently drive tasks forward while maintaining tight, continuous alignment with our PM, Architects, and Leads to shape epics and clear dependencies.
Agent-Assisted E2E Delivery: Go beyond basic code completion. We expect you to actively leverage agentic AI workflows (using tools like Gemini, Claude) across the entire product lifecycle. From shaping epics and brainstorming architecture with the PM, to automating complex development tasks, testing, and streamlining our go-to-market deployment—you will use AI to reduce cognitive load, stay unblocked, and boost your efficiency.
Collaborate & Communicate: Maintain clear communication in English regarding project status, technical hurdles, and architectural decisions, which is critical for our team's success.
requirements:
5+ Years of Experience: Proven track record as a Senior Full-Stack Engineer or a Frontend Engineer with solid backend capabilities.
React Expertise: Deep knowledge of React and the modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem.
Java: Solid proficiency in Java.
Autonomy: A demonstrable history of taking initiative, self-managing, and driving projects forward independently in a remote environment.
Language Skills: Excellent command of written and spoken English is a must have.
Forward-Thinking: A strong curiosity and willingness to adopt AI tools to accelerate your development speed.
benefits:
Personal Development Opportunities:
We believe in nurturing individual growth and happiness. As part of our commitment, we provide a range of indoor and outdoor training activities, including technical courses, English classes, and soft skills training.
Comprehensive Health Coverage:
Your well-being and that of your family are paramount to us. We cover 100% of healthcare premiums for all employees and their dependents, ensuring you can access quality medical care without financial worries.
Employee and Family Care:
At Magnolia, we extend our care beyond the workplace. From health insurance to organizing summer vacations and family events like Family Day, Children's Day, and the Mid-Autumn Festival, we prioritize the well-being and happiness of our employees and their families. Additionally, enjoy recreational activities such as football, swimming, bowling, cinema, and more.
Competitive Salary and Benefits:
Your hard work deserves recognition. Our compensation package includes:
An attractive salary, a 13th-month salary, seniority bonuses, and opportunities for career advancement.
Annual leave of up to 21 days;
Opportunity for the exchange programs to Switzerland.
Flexible Working Hours:
We understand the importance of work-life balance. Enjoy flexibility in your schedule.
Employee Perks:
Your comfort and satisfaction matter to us. Our office is stocked with beverages, fruits, and snacks, and we provide meals every evening. Join us on "Whoopee Fridays" for team-building activities, knowledge exchange sessions, and lively conversations.

title: Mid/Senior Fullstack Engineer (Python)
location: Viettel Tower, 285 CMT8, District 10, Ho Chi Minh
job_description:
Welcome to SMG Vietnam!
SMG Swiss Marketplace Group simplifies lives with innovative online marketplaces in Automotive, Real Estate, General Marketplaces, and Finance & Insurance. As SMG’s innovation hub, SMG Vietnam develops cutting-edge solutions in a collaborative, empowering environment. Recognized among the 2023 Asia & Vietnam Best Workplaces, we attract top digital talent to create exceptional user experiences for Switzerland. Guided by our core values—Better Together, Aim High, and Act Responsibly—we drive innovation and meaningful change.
This job refers to our
Real Estate brands
, Homegate and Immoscout24,
the largest real estate portals in Switzerland, with more than 15 million visits per month and more than 100,000 listings.
We provide all users looking for a property with a transparent overview of the entire range of listings without them having to tediously visit different platforms. In addition to great products such as the mortgage or price calculator, we also offer editorial articles on topics such as housing and financing.
We are looking for
a Mid/Senior Full-stack engineer (Python)
to help us build the future of the Swiss real estate market by contributing to our cutting-edge, cloud-based technology stack. The platform's core function is to digitally connect tenants with landlords and property managers, streamlining the entire process from initial listings and managing viewing appointments all the way through to the submission of digital applications. Your work will contribute to making the rental process more efficient for all parties involved.
You will get to collaborate and access the wealth of knowledge and experience from a community of amazing engineers who come from all parts of the globe and are ready to share their expertise and aid you in your path to fulfilling your potential.
Join our dynamic team, located in six countries (Switzerland, Serbia, Vietnam, France, Germany, and India), where creativity thrives. Together, we tackle challenges, celebrate successes, and keep learning and growing.
Our tech stack
Our frontend services utilize a variety of technologies, including Vue.js and React, with Typescript as the language of choice. These services consist of a mix of client-side, server-side, pre-rendered, and hybrid web apps. Additionally, some services leverage Django templates for the frontend, often mixed with React written in Typescript.
Our backend architecture utilizes a combination of technologies. We have services built with Node.js and Typescript, following a serverless and microservices pattern in AWS, leveraging services like Lambda, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and S3. Additionally, we have services built with Python and the Django Framework, running as a modularized monolithic architecture in Docker containers on on-premise servers.
Our monitoring is done mainly through Datadog and Sentry.
Our codebase and services are documented using Backstage.
Your mission
You will design, implement, test, and deliver new features that bring value to our users.
You will encourage knowledge sharing and drive technical discussions within the team.
You will translate high-level ideas and requirements into practical solutions.
You will own your own services and be responsible end-to-end for everything from development and testing to delivery and monitoring.
You will collaborate with other engineering teams as well as your existing team to ensure the stability of our microservices architecture.
You will challenge the status quo and continuously aim to improve the architecture, code, and tools to ensure the delivery of high-quality software.
Your responsibilities will evolve as we grow.
requirements:
What will you bring to the ride?
You are fluent in English, with written and verbal communication.
You've got 3+ years of experience in web development, building user-facing products with end-to-end ownership across multiple layers of the stack.
You've got 2+ years of experience with Python for backend development.
You are proficient in working with databases.

title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer (Database & K8s)
location: VNG Campus, Tân Thuận Đông, District 7, Ho Chi Minh
job_description:
Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm
Senior Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
có kinh nghiệm chuyên sâu trong việc triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu các hệ thống
Enterprise-Grade Database Clusters và Kubernetes (K8S)
.Bạn sẽ đóng vai trò quan trọng trong việc đảm bảo hạ tầng dữ liệu luôn ổn định, hiệu năng cao, có khả năng mở rộng, và được giám sát chủ động thông qua hệ thống quan sát (observability) hiện đại.
Trách nhiệm chính
Nghiên cứu, triển khai, quản trị và tối ưu các database systems (SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, v.v.).
Vận hành, tối ưu và mở rộng hệ thống Kubernetes cluster.
Thiết lập và quản lý các monitoring & alerting systems như Prometheus, Alertmanager, Grafana, ELK, v.v.
Define và tinh chỉnh metrics, alert thresholds, SLO/SLA, error budgets cho các dịch vụ database và hạ tầng quan trọng.
Tham gia xử lý sự cố (incident response), điều tra nguyên nhân gốc rễ (root cause analysis) và thực hiện post-mortem để tăng độ tin cậy hệ thống.
Tự động hóa quy trình vận hành (backup, failover, scaling, recovery, patching, CI/CD, etc.).
Xây dựng, chuẩn hóa runbook / playbook / documentation giúp đội ngũ phản ứng nhanh và hiệu quả trong tình huống khẩn cấp.
Phối hợp cùng team phát triển để cải tiến các sản phẩm database/big data.
requirements:
Yêu cầu
Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc ở vị trí SRE/DBA/System Engineer.
Thành thạo việc triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu database systems (SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, v.v.) trên môi trường on-premise hoặc on-cloud.
Có kinh nghiệm triển khai và vận hành Kubernetes trong môi trường on-premise hoặc cloud (EKS, GKE, AKS).
Kinh nghiệm thiết lập metrics, alert thresholds, dashboards cho hệ thống database và hạ tầng.
Có khả năng trực on-call, theo dõi cảnh báo và xử lý hoặc escalate kịp thời các sự cố hệ thống.
Thành thạo các công cụ monitoring & logging như Prometheus, Alertmanager, Grafana, Loki, ELK Stack,...
Biết viết script tự động hóa bằng Python / Bash / Go.
Kiến thức tốt về networking, storage, performance tuning, backup & recovery.
Tư duy hệ thống mạnh mẽ, chủ động trong việc phát hiện và xử lý vấn đề.
Điểm cộng
Có kinh nghiệm vận hành các
Enterprise-grade database cluster
như SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB Enterprise là một lợi thế.
Có kinh nghiệm vận hành distributed databases hoặc high availability clusters (Patroni, Galera, Sentinel, etc.) là một lợi thế.
Kinh nghiệm với big data systems (Kafka, ClickHouse, Elasticsearch, etc.).
Có chứng chỉ liên quan như MCSA/MCSE/Azure Database Administrator, Oracle Database (OCA / OCP), MongoDB Certified DBA / Developer, CKA/CKAD, AWS/GCP Certified hoặc DB Admin Certifications khác là một lợi thế.

title: Fullstack Engineer (PHP/NodeJS)
location: Viettel Tower, 285 CMT8, District 10, Ho Chi Minh
job_description:
Welcome to SMG Vietnam!
SMG Swiss Marketplace Group simplifies lives with innovative online marketplaces in Automotive, Real Estate, General Marketplaces, and Finance & Insurance. As SMG’s innovation hub, SMG Vietnam develops cutting-edge solutions in a collaborative, empowering environment. Recognized among the 2023 Asia & Vietnam Best Workplaces, we attract top digital talent to create exceptional user experiences for Switzerland. Guided by our core values—Better Together, Aim High, and Act Responsibly—we drive innovation and meaningful change.
This job refers to our
Real Estate brands
, Homegate and Immoscout24,
the largest real estate portals in Switzerland, with more than 15 million visits per month and more than 100,000 listings.
We provide all users looking for a property with a transparent overview of the entire range of listings without them having to tediously visit different platforms. In addition to great products such as the mortgage or price calculator, we also offer editorial articles on topics such as housing and financing.
We are looking for
a Full-stack engineer (PHP/NodeJS)
to help us build the future of the Swiss real estate market by contributing to our cutting-edge, cloud-based technology stack. You will get to collaborate and access the wealth of knowledge and experience from a community of amazing engineers who come from all parts of the globe and are ready to share their expertise and aid you in your path to fulfilling your potential.
Join our dynamic team, located in six countries (Switzerland, Serbia, Vietnam, France, Germany, and India), where creativity thrives. Together, we tackle challenges, celebrate successes, and keep learning and growing.
Our tech stack
Frontend:
React with TypeScript/JavaScript (Vue.js experience is a plus)
Backend:
TypeScript/Node.js services plus a substantial PHP codebase; cloud-native on AWS (serverless/containers, IaC)
Observability:
Datadog (incl. RUM) and Kibana for logs/metrics/traces (clear, actionable alerting)
CI/CD & Docs:
GitHub Actions + Backstage (service catalog/documentation hub)
Your mission
Owning delivery end-to-end:
Designing, implementing, testing, and delivering features across the stack, and keeping them healthy in production.
Building reliable services:
Evolving APIs, services, and data flows with pragmatic trade-offs between performance, reliability and simplicity.
Operating in production:
Improving monitoring, alerting, and incident follow-ups for the services and components your team owns.
Collaborating for impact:
Working closely with Product, Design, and Engineering to ship in small, reviewable increments and continuously improve how we build.
Your responsibilities will evolve as we grow.
requirements:
What will you bring to the ride?
We’re looking for someone who is passionate about building reliable products with real ownership. Here are the qualities that will help you thrive in this role:
Professional experience:
2+ years building user-facing products with end-to-end ownership across multiple layers of the stack and exposure to PHP or TypeScript/Node.js.
Strong communication:
Excellent English skills for collaboration with international teams and clear technical decision-making.
Backend/infrastructure leaning:
Comfortable shaping APIs, services, and data flows, while still contributing to modern frontend experiences when needed.
Pragmatic systems thinking:
Clear interfaces, sensible trade-offs, and a practical approach to modernizing existing code and patterns.
Hands-on experience with any of the following will be a plus:
Experience with React and/or Vue.js and shipping production web applications.
Familiarity with AWS, Docker, and relational databases (MySQL/PostgreSQL).

title: Mid/Senior AI Engineer (Good English)
location: Số 1, ngách 52/28 Tô Ngọc Vân, phường Quảng An, quận Tây Hồ, thành phố Hà Nội, Việt Nam , Tay Ho, Ha Noi
job_description:
We are a global fintech company building the next-generation AI ecosystem.
The world is changing fast. AI is no longer just technology in research labs — it's becoming real. Self-driving cars, intelligent robots, AI systems that learn and improve themselves... all are gradually becoming global standards.
So what will the future of fintech and business management look like when AI becomes the foundation?
That's the question our team answers every day. We're not just predicting the future—we're creating it.
Who We're Looking For
We're looking for experienced AI Engineers (mid to senior level) who can design, build, and own AI systems end-to-end. You've shipped models to production before and understand what it takes to make AI work reliably at scale. You're ready to take ownership of technical decisions and help shape our AI strategy.
We value:
Curiosity & Eagerness to Learn
– You stay current with AI advancements and constantly explore what's possible
Builder Mindset
– You want to create real products that solve real problems, and you know how to get them into production
Ownership & Initiative
– You don't wait for instructions; you identify opportunities and drive solutions forward
Technical Leadership
– You can guide technical direction, review architecture decisions, and mentor others
Good Teamwork
– You enjoy solving complex problems with cross-functional teams
Honesty & Transparency
– You communicate truthfully, raise concerns early, and share knowledge openly
Global Mindset
– You're comfortable working with international teams across time zones
Responsibilities
Lead and build AI systems for a global fintech platform:
Your Daily Work
Design and architect machine learning systems that solve complex business problems at scale
Build and optimize AI applications: natural language processing (NLP), computer vision, data analysis, and more
Own the full ML lifecycle — from problem framing and data analysis to model training, deployment, and monitoring
Create and maintain intelligent data pipelines that automatically process and learn from data
Evaluate, select, and integrate the right AI technologies and frameworks for each use case
Establish best practices for model development, testing, deployment, and monitoring
Be able to comprehend AI technologies, analyze existing workflows of the company, and train other teams to use AI in their daily work
Collaborate with product, engineering, and business teams to translate business needs into AI solutions
Contribute to AI strategy and roadmap decisions
Mentor junior AI engineers and conduct code/model reviews
What You'll Bring
Proven experience building and deploying AI/ML systems in production environments
Ability to make architectural decisions on model selection, infrastructure, and scalability
Deep understanding of trade-offs in ML system design (accuracy vs. latency, complexity vs. maintainability)
Experience debugging and optimizing production ML systems
Track record of cross-team collaboration and delivering projects end-to-end
This is high-impact, high-ownership work. You'll architect systems that serve millions of users, make decisions that shape our AI capabilities, and build the foundation for our AI-powered future.
requirements:
3+ years building & deploying AI/ML in production
Bachelor’s in a relevant field (Master’s/PhD is a plus)
Strong Python; additional language is a plus
Solid ML knowledge (DL, evaluation, feature engineering, tuning)
Experience with TensorFlow/PyTorch/scikit-learn
MLOps experience (versioning, CI/CD, monitoring)
Cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure) & Docker/Kubernetes
Strong data structures, algorithms, and SE fundamentals
Prompt engineering & LLM integration experience
Good English communication
Self-driven, able to work independently and deliver projects
benefits:
Exciting projects that impact the payments industry and digital space
Opportunity to work with an international tech team
Chance to make an impact and valuable contribution to a global product
Financial stability
Private Insurance
Paid vacation
Convenient office location near West lake
Annual assessments
Flexible working time
Optional business trips
Monthly team activity
Football & ping-pong teams inside company
Meals provided in the office  - breakfast, lunch and snacks prepared by company chefs

By applying for the above position, you accept and agree that your personal data and any information stated in the attached curriculum vitae (CV) will be used and processed by ITViec and NAB Vietnam for recruitment purposes. The storage and processing of such information will comply with the applicable laws of Vietnam, and the policies and procedures of ITViec and NAB Vietnam regarding personal data, as amended from time to time.
ABOUT THE JOB
This is an opportunity to work on the Digital Identity platform that acts as an enabler for all NAB’s digital channels and constitutes the InfoSec platform for key initiatives such as Open Banking which signals the first step into the implementation of CDR here in Australia and will form a blueprint for CDR implementations into other industries in the coming years.
This role will represent the voice of the customer and implement the vision and roadmap for a product/set of features. It translates strategy into actionable solutions by prioritizing and shaping initiatives that align with domain objectives.
MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES
Collaborate within your respective squads: Work closely with a multidisciplinary delivery squad that includes engineers, business analysts, architects, designers and release train engineers to deliver and prioritize the product workload.
Document and define requirements: Capture and clearly document requirements, acceptance criteria and user stories to ensure alignment in collaboration with your squad and product team members.
Facilitate Agile processes: Support agile ceremonies and cadences within the squad to maintain momentum and resolve blockers.
Engage stakeholders: Act as the main point of contact for stakeholders collaboration, ensuring customer and strategic outcomes are met incrementally in alignment with broader domain objectives and business goals.
Support squad culture: Foster a collaborative and productive squad environment, supporting team's way of working and decision-making processes.
Track and report progress: Regularly review, report on and track the squad's progress, making informed decisions as needed
Fulfil other tasks as assigned by your People Leader and/or authorized representative of NAB Vietnam from time to time.
requirements:
Must-haves:
5+ experience as a Digital Product Owner,
with a total of minimum
7 years minimum
in IT products, leading a squad and delivering products or features in complex, integrated systems.
Have experience working on digital journeys for customer log-in, lifecycle, and access.
Product development methodologies: Strong understanding of Agile and hybrid methodologies, with hands-on experience.
Backlog management & documentation: Proficient in backlog management and prioritization, fluency in using product management tools to document and track progresses.
Customer-obsession mindset: Demonstrated ability to translate customer needs and pain points into product or feature implementations to deliver business outcomes.
Communication & stakeholder management skills: Excellent verbal & written communication skills in English, effective in managing multiple stakeholders across functions.
Nice-to-have:
Industry experience: Experience in banking, financial services, or other highly regulated industries.
International focus: Background in serving international and diverse customer bases.
Technical acumen: Proficiency in basic technical concepts related to product development and platform components is a plus.
CORE COMPETENCIES:
Customer Impact: Considers customer needs and actions, adds value for the customer.
Business Acumen: Understands business drivers, has financial and commercial orientation.
Relationship Building & Influence: Builds strong relationships and uses influence effectively
benefits:
1. Generous compensation and benefit package
Attractive salary and benefits
20-day annual leave and 7-day sick leave, etc.
13th month salary and Annual Performance Bonus
Premium healthcare for yourself and family members
2. Exciting career and development opportunities

Clear roadmap for career advancement in both technical and leadership pathways

A DIVERSE AND INCLUSIVE WORKPLACE WORKS BETTER FOR EVERYONE
NAB is a place where colleagues of all genders, sexualities and ages, carers and colleagues with disability, and colleagues from all cultures, races and religions have the opportunity to thrive, connect and grow.

title: Business Customer Data Analyst  - Data Division
location: Tòa nhà MB, số 18 Lê Văn Lương, Phường Yên Hòa, Ha Noi
job_description:

Môi trường làm việc lý tưởng với:

title: LG Dream Code and LG Track Program for Freshers IT
location: Tầng 17 đến tầng 21, Tòa văn phòng, Lotte Mall Hà Nội, Số 272 Võ Chí Công, Phường Phú Thượng, Quận Tây Hồ, Thành phố Hà Nội, Tay Ho, Ha Noi; Tầng 3, Tòa Nhà Parkson, số 255 Hùng Vương, Phường Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng, Hai Chau, Da Nang; Fresher Accepted
job_description:
LG DREAM CODE & LG TRACK 2026 CHÍNH THỨC TRỞ LẠI!
Sau hai mùa thành công 2024 & 2025, cuộc thi lập trình LG DREAM CODE đã chính thức quay trở lại vào mùa hè 2026, hứa hẹn mang đến một sân chơi bùng nổ dành cho các tài năng công nghệ trên toàn quốc.
Đăng ký tham gia, bạn sẽ có cơ hội

30 thí sinh có điểm cao nhất trong cuộc thi sẽ được mời tham gia phỏng vấn cùng các chuyên gia công nghệ, mở ra cơ hội trở thành nhân viên chính thức của LG Electronics R&D Vietnam và nhận các phúc lợi hấp dẫn (học bổng LG Track/ sign-on bonus) lên đến 20 triệu VND/ người.

title: Chuyên gia quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu (PostgreSQL)
location: 1 Luong Yen, Hai Ba Trung, Ha Noi
job_description:
1. Design And Implementation
- Define the configuration for the database implementation within the organization. This shall include proper sizing and the detail requirement on parameters, file location, etc.
- Determine and monitor the capacity and utilization of databases and corresponding hardware.
- Determine the upgrade path for over utilized databases and corresponding hardware.
- Verify the justification of the database requirement from vendors for their solution installing in the company.
- Implement the design in professional manner.
- Ensure zero data loss by proper backup/recovery mechanism design.
- Ensure the database facilities operating and recovery within the agreed SLA.
- Determine the best approach for system protection requirement such as load balancing, failover, remote site protection, etc.
- Determine the risks in database facilities and the resolution to rectify the risks.
2. Operation Support
- Perform any database cleansing ensuring the health working environment.
- Implement ETL, clean up and transform external data to fit the desired format, efficiently importing large volumes of data extracted from multiple systems into a data warehouse environment.
- Determine the effectiveness of the restoration for the database by the backup data.
- Determine/define the mechanism for the monitoring of the performance & exceptions of the database facilities.
- Determine/define the mechanism on detecting any issues happening in the database facilities in the campus.
- Rectify the issues immediately if happening.
- Perform user administrative activities on database level but not included user administration on application level.
- Define/design the operation reports required to summaries the status of the database facilities for management. This shall include the utilization vs capacity, rate of availability, issues, etc.
3. Security & Authentication
- Determine potential weaknesses of the database software and the company’s overall system.
- Determine how to protect the database facilities.
- Implement best practices to minimize security risks.
- Set up access policy according to the company’s role matrix to control who has access and what type of access they are allowed.
- Set up audit policy.
- Consult audit logs in the case of a security breach or irregularity.
4. Documentation & Version Control
- Document the design of the database facilities with the detail of diagram, system parameters and requirement, protection mechanism, and other related material as well as its historical changes becoming part of the IT Architecture Dossier.
- Prepare the documents keep the latest and historical information of the facilities becoming part of the inventory control of the department.
- Maintain the configuration document for each facility keeping the latest configuration parameter, historical changes on parameters in each device, and the method of changing the parameter becoming part of the
- Configuration Control and Version Control within the department
- Prepare the operation guide for each facility.
requirements:
- University Degrees or above in IT, Computer Mathematics or related subjects.
- At least 5 years as Database Administrator in companies in the field of banking, finance, telecommunications or equivalent.
- Expert knowledge of Oracle Database (12c and higher) or Microsoft SQL Server Database (2016 and higher), is a must.
- IBM DB2, PostgreSQL and MongoDB administrative experience is an advantage.
- In-depth experience of databases running on Unix server.
- Solid experience in supporting High Availability database environment: various operating systems, clustering, HA, event debugging and issue resolution.
- Proficiency in using PLSQL (or T-SQL, PL/pgSQL ...) is a strong advantage.
- Experience of database tuning and capacity planning is an advantage.
- Experience with securities trading systems is an advantage.
- Knowledge with security model to manage risks through patching or innovative techniques.
- Good presentation, written and verbal communication skill.
- Communication skills, communication confidence, teamwork, good customer relations.
- Ability to work independently, under pressure and large.
benefits:
Highly competitive remuneration package: Attractive monthly salary, 13th month salary, KPIs cash bonus, Public holiday cash bonus, Birthday gift, Lunar new year gift,...
Premium AON healthcare insurane and full labor insurance
12 days Annual leave + 2 days sick leave with full paid
Luxury team-building trip and varied engagement activities
Joining the leisure clubs: Football, E-Sport, Running, Gym, Yoga....
Fully sponsored training to build your career
Professional, open minded and supportive working enviroment

title: Fullstack Java Software Architect (Fintech, AWS, Micro)
location: Thảo Điền, Thu Duc City, Ho Chi Minh; 27 Láng Hạ, Phường Thành Công, Quận Ba Đình, Hà Nội, Ba Dinh, Ha Noi
job_description:
Role summary
Vietpay is hiring a high impact Full Stack Java Software Architect who can design and build enterprise grade middleware and microservices that connect multiple interfaces, including mobile apps, multiple web server systems, customer facing channels, and partner integrations. You will be hands on in Java development while also leading architecture decisions across APIs, data, messaging, cloud infrastructure, and reliability. Experience building or contributing to gamified platforms is a strong advantage, along with prior work in fintech, banking, or regulated financial services.
Key responsibilities
1) Architecture and system design
• Own service architecture and technical design for core platforms, including domain boundaries, service contracts, and integration patterns.
• Design for resilience and scale: latency budgets, timeouts, retries, idempotency, circuit breakers, and graceful degradation.
• Define API standards: versioning, error models, authentication patterns, and partner onboarding guidelines.
• Create documentation that scales: architecture diagrams, decision logs, interface specs, and runbooks.
2) Java backend and middleware development
• Build and maintain production services in Java using Spring Boot or equivalent frameworks.
• Develop middleware orchestration services that connect internal systems and external partners.
• Write clean, testable code with high engineering discipline: unit tests, integration tests, and code reviews.
• Continuously improve performance and reliability through profiling, refactoring, and better data access patterns.
3) API and partner integrations
• Deliver secure, stable APIs for customer and partner use cases, including webhooks and event driven flows where appropriate.
• Integrate with banks, payment partners, and third party providers, ensuring auditability and operational supportability.
• Implement robust monitoring for external dependencies and define clear operational playbooks for incidents.
4) Full stack delivery and cross team execution
• Collaborate with mobile, web, product, QA, operations, and compliance teams to deliver end to end features.
• Contribute to web application integration work when needed, ensuring frontend and backend alignment.
• Translate requirements into technical plans, tickets, and release milestones, with clear trade offs and risk management.
5) Cloud, DevOps, and reliability (AWS)
• Design and operate services on AWS with strong security and networking fundamentals.
• Use containers and orchestration such as Docker and ECS or EKS, plus CI and CD pipelines for safe deployments.
• Build production readiness into every release: logging, metrics, tracing, dashboards, alerts, and on call handover.
• Participate in incident response, root cause analysis, and post incident improvements.
6) Data and storage (SQL, Neo4j, MongoDB)
• Own relational data design and query performance, including schema design, indexing, migrations, and reporting friendliness.
• Work with or design solutions involving Neo4j for relationship graphs, and MongoDB for document workloads, as needed.
• Ensure data integrity, access control, and audit trails appropriate for financial services systems.
7) Messaging and real time systems (optional plus)
• Design and implement event driven flows for reliability and decoupling between services.
• Experience with MQTT is a strong plus, especially for device and real time event streams.
• Familiarity with Kafka, RabbitMQ, SQS, or SNS is helpful.
8) Gamification and engagement systems
• Build or contribute to gamification features such as points, levels, badges, missions, streaks, and leaderboards.
• Design gamification to be configurable, measurable, and safe, including fraud resistance and audit logging.
• Partner with product and analytics to define engagement metrics and run controlled experiments.
9) Engineering leadership and standards
• Mentor engineers, raise code quality, and influence best practices across teams.
• Establish reusable service templates and libraries that speed up delivery while improving consistency.
• Promote a professional international engineering culture: clarity, accountability, and calm execution under pressure.
requirements:
Must have
• 7+ years of professional software engineering experience, with strong Java and enterprise grade backend delivery.
• Proven experience designing and building microservices, middleware platforms, and API first systems.
• Strong AWS and cloud engineering experience, including deployment, security, and reliability practices.
• Strong SQL database experience, including schema design and performance tuning.
• Solid understanding of software engineering best practices: testing, code reviews, CI and CD, documentation, and design patterns.
• Ability to work across multiple teams and stakeholders, with strong written and spoken English.
• Experience in financial services, banking, insurance, or other regulated environments is strongly preferred.
Preferred qualifications
• Hands on experience with Neo4j and graph modeling for relationships such as merchant networks, referrals, or risk scoring.
• Hands on experience with MongoDB for document and event storage use cases.
• MQTT experience for device messaging or real time pipelines.
• Fintech and payments experience, including NAPAS, Visa, or Mastercard related workflows.
• Experience with observability tooling such as OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana, or ELK stacks.
• Experience building gamified platforms or engagement engines with measurable outcomes.
Tools and working methods
• Engineering: Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs, microservices, containerization, and structured code review practices.
• Cloud: AWS services for compute, storage, networking, logging, and security.
• Data: SQL databases plus optional Neo4j and MongoDB, with disciplined migrations and performance monitoring.
• Collaboration: Jira or equivalent, documentation in Confluence or Notion, and clear written updates with decision logs.
benefits:
International fintech & digital banking firm
Top salary, bonus & stock options
Work & travel globally with innovation teams
Social insurance based on full salary
Full Training will be provided to Candidate

title: Software Engineer (Mobile + Security)
location: VNG Campus, Tân Thuận Đông, District 7, Ho Chi Minh
job_description:
1. Giới thiệu
BShield là giải pháp bảo mật Runtime Application Self-Protection (RASP) "Make in Vietnam", chuyên bảo vệ các ứng dụng và game trên mobile (android, iOS) khỏi các cuộc tấn công thời gian thực.
BShield được tích hợp trực tiếp vào bên trong ứng dụng để tự phát hiện và chặn các hành vi dịch ngược (Reverse Engineering), tiêm mã (Hooking) hay gian lận (Fraud). Gia nhập BShield, bạn sẽ trực tiếp tham gia vào cuộc đấu trí với các kỹ thuật tấn công mới nhất trên thị trường.
2. Bạn sẽ làm gì?
Phát triển Core Shield (R&D):
Xây dựng layer bảo vệ: Thiết kế và phát triển các module chống Debug, Hooking, chống Root/Jailbreak, nhận diện máy ảo (Emulator) và ngăn chặn mọi can thiệp trái phép vào Runtime của app.
Xáo trộn mã (Obfuscation):
Triển khai các kỹ thuật làm rối code ở mức LLVM IR, Bytecode hoặc Machine code để gia tăng tối đa độ khó cho việc dịch ngược.
Nghiên cứu tấn công (Security Research):
Phân tích các công cụ như Frida, Magisk, APatch... và các kỹ thuật tấn công mới nhất để liên tục nâng cấp năng lực phòng thủ cho BShield.
Tối ưu hiệu suất:
Đảm bảo lớp bảo vệ hoạt động tối ưu – bảo mật tuyệt đối nhưng không làm chậm app, tốn pin hay nóng máy cho người dùng cuối.
Đồng hành cùng khách hàng (Support & Integration):
Hỗ trợ tích hợp:
Trực tiếp hướng dẫn đội ngũ Dev của khách hàng nhúng BShield vào dự án và cấu hình trên hệ thống CI/CD.
Xử lý sự cố thực tế:
